name: as5600-angle-tester
description: Standalone AS5600 angle sensor tester and configurator for Volumio 4 (Bookworm)
author: OpenAI

volumio_info.details: Standalone AS5600 tester for Volumio 4. Reads the sensor over I2C, supports calibration, toast-based live testing, volume mapping and custom plugin emit for integration testing without RadioScale.
volumio_info.changelog: 0.1.0: Initial standalone AS5600 tester for Volumio 4 Bookworm.
